citations.draft_sentence: Under the NIS2 regime, authorities may impose fines even without a preceding security incident, and affected entities must maintain documented governance structures.<sup>[1](https://www.activemind.de/nis2)</sup><sup>[2](https://www.bsi.bund.de/nis2-pflichten)</sup>

Under the NIS2 regime, authorities may impose fines even without a preceding security incident, and affected entities must maintain documented governance structures.<sup>[1](https://www.activemind.de/nis2)</sup><sup>[2](https://www.bsi.bund.de/nis2-pflichten)</sup>
Essential and important entities across eighteen regulated sectors fall within the directive's scope.<sup>[2](https://www.bsi.bund.de/nis2-pflichten)</sup>
